comment: Enumerated runtime API policy (TDD §11, AC-15). 'probed' APIs carry attempted-use instrumentation in the artifact (attempted use, not final state); 'csp-governed' APIs are blocked by the CSP; 'procedural' entries are authored-code disciplines checked by review/tests, not instrumentable at runtime. The CSP governs the page; extensions and user actions are outside it.
csp: default-src 'none'; img-src data:; style-src 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'unsafe-inline'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; object-src 'none'; connect-src 'none'

location.assign.note: Location methods are non-configurable and cannot be probe-wrapped; authored code never navigates (checked by the writer-set/navigation review and AC-10 scripted checks)

innerHTML-untrusted.note: no untrusted innerHTML; source-derived text escaped for context (AC-09)
